message:
fix(coordinator): prevent panic on empty slice and optimize string length check

- Add guard in removeRecommendation for empty slice input to prevent
  panic from make(slice, 0, -1) when len(recs) == 0
- Replace len(sb.String()) with sb.Len() for O(1) length check instead
  of creating a new string copy on each iteration
- Add test cases for empty slice edge case

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
